description: The Lamborghini Huracán, produced from 2014 to 2024, was the last Lamborghini powered exclusively by a naturally aspirated engine. Its 5.2-litre V10 produced up to 640 bhp in STO and Tecnica forms. The rear-wheel-drive STO, inspired by the Super Trofeo race car, is the ultimate road-going version.
